headline: Is Mastercard’s AI Agent Payment Push Quietly Reframing Its Trust Advantage in Digital Commerce (MA)?
summary: Lobster.cash, the payment solution for AI agents built by Crossmint, recently announced it will integrate Mastercard Agent Pay and the Verifiable Intent framework, allowing Mastercard cardholders to let AI agents transact on their behalf without sharing card credentials while preserving issuer oversight and cryptographic proof of user authorization. This move highlights how Mastercard is embedding a network-backed trust layer directly into fast-growing open agent ecosystems, aligning...
